# NEON ARCADE

> Play 35+ free online browser games instantly — no download, no login required. Arcade, puzzle and skill games with global leaderboards.

NEON ARCADE is a collection of 35+ free HTML5 browser games organized in three categories:

## Categories

- [NEON ARCADE](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/) — Quick viral action games (30-60 seconds)
- [NEON MIND](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/) — Classic brain puzzles (Sudoku, Minesweeper, Queens, etc.)
- [NEON GRIND](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/) — Progressive skill challenges

## Popular Games

- [Neon Snake](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/neon-snake.html) — Classic snake with risk vs reward mechanics
- [Sudoku](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/sudoku.html) — 9x9 Sudoku with four difficulty levels
- [Minesweeper](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/minesweeper.html) — Six progressive grid sizes
- [Queens](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/queens.html) — Place queens on colored regions, no conflicts
- [MathBlitz](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/mathblitz.html) — Mental math speed challenge, 30 levels
- [Tetris Betrayal](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/tetris-betrayal.html) — Play Tetris badly on purpose
- [Impostor Pixel](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/impostor-pixel.html) — Spot the different tile

## Features

- All games are free, no account required
- Every game runs in the browser (HTML5, no plugins)
- Mobile and desktop support with touch and keyboard controls
- Global leaderboards and score sharing
- Neon-retro visual style with dark theme
